circadian_drift.message: Your sleep rhythm is drifting. Reduce screen exposure tonight and sleep before 10:30.

weak_agni.message: Digestive fire appears weak today. Eat slowly and avoid cold drinks.

vata_imbalance.message: Vata is elevated. Warm meals and grounding routines can help stabilize today.

kapha_accumulation.message: Kapha is rising. Start the day with movement and avoid heavy breakfast.

stress_overload.message: Your stress load is high today. Take a short breathing pause to reset.

morning_checkin.message: Good morning. Check in with your body to update your Dinaveda state for today.

midday_agni_reminder.message: Your digestive fire may be weaker today. Eat your main meal calmly.

evening_circadian_reminder.message: Your circadian rhythm needs support tonight. Reduce stimulation and prepare for sleep.

kapha_rising_alert.message: Kapha imbalance risk detected. Choose lighter meals tonight and add movement tomorrow morning.

sleep_debt_alert.message: Sleep debt is accumulating. Prioritize early sleep tonight to restore balance.

pitta_imbalance.message: Internal heat appears elevated. Cooling foods and calming breathing practices may help today.

mental_fatigue.message: Mental clarity appears reduced today. A short break or walk outdoors may help reset.
